synopsis: An ancient ruin slowly breaks apart and floats into a bioluminescent sky, eventually forming a new constellation of stone.

shots.prompt: Camera drifts through a vast, overgrown ancient stone ruin under soft, diffused light, with thick vines clinging to colossal, weathered blocks and silent archways, hinting at a forgotten civilization.

The ruins begin to subtly lift and break apart from the ground, individual blocks and sections slowly detaching and floating upwards into the darkening sky, revealing glimpses of a cosmic, bioluminescent nebula beneath where the ground used to be.

The camera drifts upwards with a colossal segment of the ruins, now clearly floating among countless other glowing stone islands in a vibrant, cosmic, bioluminescent nebula. The fragmented ruins are bathed in soft, pulsing cyan and magenta light.

The floating ruins spread out and gently disperse, their glowing fragments slowly resolving into a tranquil, vast field of geometric, luminous stone formations that form a silent, ethereal constellation against the deep cosmic backdrop.
